front_page_blurb:
Afternoon. 

Joe Lodge at the wheel this week, trying to think of an alternative explanation for the two hours of working day he spent failing to take 10 points off Laertis. One can't claim to have be mourning Elizabeth II in and around what would've been her 100th birthday three days in a row. 

Fans of cost effective, data driven acquisition strategy will have noticed that they weren't given the opportunity to predict a Brighton win over Chelsea, a fact for which I can only apologise. 

Two juicy fixtures to predict tonight (Wednesday 22nd April 2026), and a load more on the weekend. 

Keep dancing!
